# Maths Lower-Primary Standards Index

## Scope

This index covers Maths lower-primary standards integration for MPH Maths 1A and MPH Maths 1B. It extends the Foundation Maths pilot by making the 1A -> 1B progression searchable through canonical objectives and observable evidence requirements.

## Generated Files

- Standard outcomes: `learning/curriculum/standards-integration/math-lower-primary-standard-outcomes.jsonl`
- Crosswalk: `learning/curriculum/standards-integration/math-lower-primary-standard-crosswalk.csv`
- Canonical objectives: `learning/curriculum/standards-integration/math-lower-primary-canonical-objectives.yaml`
- Audit report: `docs/audit/math-lower-primary-standards-crosswalk-report.md`

## Primary Standards Sources

| Source family | Role |
| --- | --- |
| China 2022 Mathematics | Local first-stage reference for number, operations, quantity relationships, measurement, geometry, data, and mathematical communication |
| Singapore MOE Primary Mathematics 2021, updated Oct 2025 | Main lower-primary content architecture for Primary 1 number to 100, operations, multiplication/division concepts, money, length, time, shapes, and picture graphs |
| IB PYP Mathematics Continuum | Developmental and inquiry-friendly observable behaviours for number, measurement, shape/space, pattern/function, and data handling |

## Canonical Objective Lookup

| Canonical objective | Domain | Main evidence needed |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `co.math.lp.count-represent-to-100.001` | number sense | child counts, reads, writes, or represents numbers up to 100 |
| `co.math.lp.place-value-tens-ones.001` | place value | child shows two-digit numbers as tens and ones |
| `co.math.lp.compare-order-patterns.001` | comparison / patterns | child compares, orders, or continues number patterns with reasoning |
| `co.math.lp.part-whole-number-bonds.001` | number bonds | child composes, decomposes, or checks whole and parts |
| `co.math.lp.add-subtract-within-20.001` | operations | child adds/subtracts within 20 with visible strategy |
| `co.math.lp.two-digit-add-subtract.001` | operations | child solves two-digit addition/subtraction with place-value support |
| `co.math.lp.regrouping-readiness.001` | place-value operations | child explains regrouping as exchanging tens and ones |
| `co.math.lp.word-problems-representation.001` | problem solving | child models a story problem and explains answer meaning |
| `co.math.lp.multiplication-equal-groups.001` | multiplication | child models equal groups or repeated addition |
| `co.math.lp.division-sharing-grouping.001` | division | child models equal sharing or grouping and checks fairness |
| `co.math.lp.data-picture-graphs.001` | data | child reads, compares, and answers questions from a picture graph |
| `co.math.lp.length-measurement.001` | measurement | child compares or measures length fairly |
| `co.math.lp.time-routines.001` | time | child reads or matches hour/half-hour times to routines |
| `co.math.lp.money-values.001` | money | child recognizes denominations, counts amounts, or compares values |
| `co.math.lp.shape-space-patterns.001` | geometry / patterns | child names, sorts, composes, positions, or patterns with shapes |
| `co.math.lp.math-explanation-habits.001` | mathematical reasoning | child explains a strategy, representation, error, or check |

## Maths 1A To 1B Continuity

MPH Maths 1A remains the base for:

- counting and representation to 20
- number bonds and part-whole thinking
- addition/subtraction within 20
- shapes, position, patterns, and length
- explaining strategies with objects or drawings

MPH Maths 1B extends this into:

- numbers to 40 and 100
- tens-and-ones place value
- two-digit addition/subtraction and regrouping readiness
- picture graphs
- equal groups and division sharing/grouping
- time and money

## Boundaries

- This is not a worksheet, diagnostic pack, learning plan, or activity.
- It does not write or imply child progress.
- Textbook coverage is not evidence of mastery.
- Future progress ledger entries require real observation records and support-level notes.
